recentTweets.text: Trump is not willing to do anything to make our lives affordable, so he wants to talk about the 2020 election. This won’t distract us from the high price of gas, groceries, and drugs. (4/4)

In California, ballots are valid if mailed by Election Day, even if received a week later. Virtually all ballots are counted by then. Officials have a month to deal with a tiny number of questionable ballots. It’s careful, accurate, and honest. (3/4)

The California voter list is available to thousands of candidates and consultants every election. That’s how we send you all that mail. And that list includes your party registration, which is why Democrats got more mail from me than Republicans. (1/4)

The 22nd Amendment to the Constitution states: “No person shall be elected to the office of the President more than twice…”

We all know Trump was elected in 2016. So if Trump was also elected in 2020, then it was not constitutional for him to be elected in 2024.

The 22nd Amendment to the Constitution states: “No person shall be elected to the office of the President more than twice…”

So if Trump was elected in 2020, then it was not constitutional for him to be elected in 2024.
